task: orchestrator per-phase progress log — emit phase_started + phase_completed with elapsed_ms on every phase transition, plus agent_run_started + agent_run_finished per-agent run
summary:
Chairman: '添加 orchestrator 进度日志 (每 phase)' + '现在什么情况' + '我需要的是一个能多方面思考完成任务的工具'.

Two pieces:

1. emit_phase (orchestrator.rs:218):
   - On the FIRST phase: log 'workflow started' with wf_id + first phase name
   - On EVERY subsequent phase: log 'phase completed' with from_phase + to_phase + phase_runtime_ms
   - phase_started_at + current_phase tracked on Orchestrator struct to compute elapsed.

2. run_agent (orchestrator.rs:324):
   - BEFORE: log 'agent run starting' with wf_id + role + role_display
   - AFTER Done event: log 'agent run finished' with wf_id + status + text_len
   - These are INFO-level so they always appear in the log file (the default level is INFO).

Chairman asked for these because:
- The old log showed only 'phase transition' DEBUG lines (re-decode of secrets) + the final 'workflow finished' line
- No visibility into how long each phase took or which agent was running
- This made it impossible to debug stalls (the mimo:mimo-2.5-pro 401 issue that caused summary_len:0 earlier)

FILES: crates/pipe-server/src/orchestrator.rs (+102 lines, -2 deletions)
COMMIT: 81a7dcd
reason: Chairman: '添加 orchestrator 进度日志 (每 phase)' — needed to diagnose stalls in the 8-phase workflow. Two INFO-level log additions: phase_started/phase_finished with elapsed_ms, agent run started/finished with role+status.
